overview: LinkSphere is a Facebook-like social media platform paired with Siraji, a powerful admin panel. Users enjoy a full social experience with feed, reels, friends, stories, and verified profiles. Admins control everything through a separate dashboard with user management, post moderation, analytics, and content tools.
features: Facebook-like newsfeed with stories and posts
Friends system with requests and suggestions
User profiles with cover photo and verified tick
Siraji Admin Panel at /admin with email+password login
Admin dashboard with stats cards and activity timeline
User management: ban, verify, delete, assign roles
Post moderation queue with approve/delete actions
Verified tick badge system managed from admin panel
Product and file management from admin panel
Analytics charts: user growth, post activity, engagement
Admin settings: accounts, branding, moderation rules
